rationale: The alert package shows evidence of UAC bypass using sdclt.exe. A PowerShell command (EV-001, EV-002) modifies the registry to hijack the 'open\command' for folders, then sdclt.exe (A0) is executed, which launches control.exe (EV-003), which in turn executes the malicious PowerShell command (EV-004) with elevated privileges. The PowerShell command itself attempts to extract and execute code from an image file, indicating further malicious intent.
